title: speculantha recta
intro: Speculantha recta, also known as 'Wild Dagga', is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a muscle relaxant and anxiolytic, making it useful in treating anxiety and insomnia. Its health benefits also include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antibacterial properties. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and promote relaxation.
